data.name: InvalidOrganizationOrUser
data.value: OrganizationId and UserId must be valid.

data.name: InvalidFatigueLevel
data.value: FatigueLevel must be between 0 and 100.

data.name: InvalidRiskLevel
data.value: RiskLevel must be LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH or CRITICAL.

data.name: InvalidHeartRateOrHrv
data.value: HeartRate and Hrv must be greater than zero.

data.name: InvalidSeverity
data.value: Severity must be LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH or CRITICAL.

data.name: InvalidClinicalAlertStatus
data.value: Status must be OPEN, ACKNOWLEDGED or RESOLVED.

data.name: InvalidAnomalyStatus
data.value: Status must be OPEN, REVIEWED or RESOLVED.

data.name: MessageRequired
data.value: Message is required.

data.name: TypeRequired
data.value: Type is required.

data.name: ValueAndThresholdRequired
data.value: Value and Threshold are required.

data.name: ClinicalAlertNotFound
data.value: Clinical alert not found.

data.name: VitalSignAnomalyNotFound
data.value: Vital sign anomaly not found.

data.name: InvalidCortisolLevel
data.value: CortisolLevel cannot be negative.

data.name: InvalidSensorStatus
data.value: SensorStatus must be ACTIVE, DISCONNECTED or ERROR.

data.name: OperationCancelled
data.value: The operation was cancelled.

data.name: CreateRiskAssessmentDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while creating the risk assessment.

data.name: CreateClinicalAlertDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while creating the clinical alert.

data.name: UpdateClinicalAlertDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while updating the clinical alert.

data.name: CreateVitalSignAnomalyDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while creating the vital sign anomaly.

data.name: UpdateVitalSignAnomalyDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while updating the vital sign anomaly.

data.name: CreateVitalSignReadingDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while creating the vital sign reading.

data.name: UnexpectedRiskAssessmentError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the risk assessment.

data.name: UnexpectedClinicalAlertCreateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the clinical alert.

data.name: UnexpectedClinicalAlertUpdateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the clinical alert.

data.name: UnexpectedVitalSignAnomalyCreateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the vital sign anomaly.

data.name: UnexpectedVitalSignAnomalyUpdateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the vital sign anomaly.

data.name: UnexpectedVitalSignReadingCreateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the vital sign reading.
